\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
High-\/level driver for SIE simulations and field evaluation. 

Workflow\+: 1) \doxylink{classSimJob_a83d402c189aeefdce43afbd3cb66f709}{Load\+From\+File()} parses the job file\+: mesh, materials, sources, etc. 2) \doxylink{classSimJob_aab5e82b9e59f35e95195fe298b1aaeaf}{Create\+LSEMatrix()} allocates the A matrix; domains fill it via the formulations (PMCHWT). 3) For each subjob\+: \doxylink{classSimJob_a85f2c21f521105259a5dcbaabb9c4e7a}{Create\+LSEVec()} and \doxylink{classSimJob_a6db37fa49c08fa49ae7888c32c8f382d}{Create\+Sol\+Vec()}, fill excitation vectors, then \doxylink{classSimJob_a3af5b2630698df72bd1aa6b3efdcbb66}{Solve\+LSE()} to get the solution current vector(s). 4) Optionally \doxylink{classSimJob_a20b37e2e0aa2502a3ec465a5705b1774}{Field\+Eval()} to sample fields or power/cross sections. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{SimJob_8h_source_l00043}{43}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{SimJob_8h_source}{Sim\+Job.\+h}}.
